docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORDE, MELISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, FOR DOCUMENTED EXPENSES INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF IN CONNECTION WITH TERMINATION OF TENANCY & DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO PROVIDE A HABITABLE RENTAL UNIT TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-221) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORDE, MELISSA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FORDE, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-222)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FORDE, MELISSA
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORDE, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $10,251.66 RE 35308 FOR TRANSACTION W0518418D001 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO MELISSA FORDE, DOC #1909107673, WARRANT #38205315, DATED JUN-06-2018
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED DEC-23-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF MELISSA FORDE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHARD ALLEN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD
